name: Bob Burton Memorial Tennis Courts
description: Bob Burton Memorial Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in West Frankfort, IL. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The court is free.

name: Miners Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Miners Memorial Park in Sesser, IL! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.
